author.bio: Book Writer, Video Maker, Science Communicator, Small Business Lover. Co-creator of Crash Course, SciShow, Vlogbrothers, VidCon, http://DFTBA.com, and ot
author.name: Hank Green

content.text: It's pretty wild that a tweet from Donald Trump hurts the stock market more than the rapidly escalating destruction of the Earth's largest point-source of oxygen.
